label: Gravship thruster comp
description: Comp properties for a gravship thruster building. Extends the gravship facility comp with visual flame and exhaust particle settings.

exclusionAreaSize.label: Exclusion area size
exclusionAreaSize.description: Size of the cell area excluded by this thruster as (x, y, z) with integer components.

exclusionAreaOffset.label: Exclusion area offset
exclusionAreaOffset.description: Offset of the exclusion area from the thruster position as (x, y, z) with integer components.

directionInfluence.label: Direction influence
directionInfluence.description: How much this thruster contributes to the gravship's direction of travel.

flameOffsetsPerDirection.label: Flame offsets per direction
flameOffsetsPerDirection.description: World-space flame draw offsets per rotation direction. Typically four entries in order: North, East, South, West.

flameSize.label: Flame size
flameSize.description: Visual size of the flame mote.

flameShaderType.label: Flame shader type
flameShaderType.description: ShaderTypeDef used for the flame mote. Private field in source; set by XML directly. Resolved at runtime to MoteGlow if absent.

flameShaderParameters.label: Flame shader parameters
flameShaderParameters.description: Named shader property overrides for the flame mote. Each child element name is a Unity shader property name (e.g. _MainTex, _Color); values are texture paths (starting with '/'), floats, or vectors.

exhaustSettings.label: Exhaust settings
exhaustSettings.description: Particle exhaust emission settings for this thruster.
